title: Brotein anabolic-app unranked-leaderboard fragment
html:
Low-OCR fragment of a brotein "anabolic app" unranked leaderboard — single-digit and double-digit values (5, 39, 93, 44) visible, no narrative, kept as a build-state breadcrumb for the September-2025 brotein testing arc.

brotein · ios
